leadText: If you were looking for the places where Dynamaxing is possible, see Dynamax. Power Spot (Japanese: パワースポット Power Spot) is an Ability introduced in Generation VIII. It is the signature Ability of Stonjourner.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] The power of moves used by the allies of the Pokémon with Power Spot is increased by 30%. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Power Spot has no effect outside of battle.

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] The power of moves used by the allies of the Pokémon with Power Spot is increased by 30%.
